system.description:
Precision Strikers are the Duelists who believe that style is for amateurs. They live in the math of the engagement: angles of attack, momentum transfer, the exact millimeter where the plate carrier seam meets the armpit. They train against high-end opposition simulators and against each other, and they regard a fight that lasts more than three exchanges as a failure of preparation.

On the job, the Precision Striker chooses one target and finishes them. Their entry feature is Surgical Strike: when they attack a target they have studied for at least one round, the attack rolls with advantage and ignores a portion of the target's armor.
system.grants: Surgical Strike: studied targets are attacked with advantage and partial armor bypass.

wizard.tagline: Read the target, choose the seam, end the conversation
